conversation.message_text: Farmacy Beauty: Welcome to Farmacy Beauty! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/aF1

Farmacy Beauty: Welcome! We believe good skin is rooted in healthy ingredients. Start your journey for conscious beauty with 15% off using code: FARMACY15
Shop Now https://farmacy.attn.tv/aMyV9XK1WYAw 
Feel free to text us if you ever have any questions!
Farmacy Beauty: Don't forget to save our contact for exclusive updates!

Farmacy Beauty: Hi! This is Kelsey. I see you left something in your cart https://farmacy.attn.tv/a82eeUiZ0COm 
Is there anything you've been looking for that I can help find? Text back with any questions!
I tried tonorder the Honey Skin duo, but it wouldn't let me checkout.  It forced me to order them separately and pay way more

Farmacy Beauty: I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble placing an order. Could you please share a screenshot of what happened when you tried to check out?

In the meantime, I recommend using a different device, such as a desktop computer or laptop, ensuring you're logged into the correct account, and having a stable internet connection. I might also suggest trying a different internet browser, as certain ones can sometimes cause issues with e-commerce stores. Let me know if this resolves the issue.
The honey skin duo
It's $75 and I ended up having to pay over $100.  There was no problems checking out when I ordered them separately, so I know the issue is not using a certain device or a connection issue
Farmacy Beauty: Thanks for the screenshot! I'll be more than happy to check on this with my team for you. Can I have your name and email address, please?
Ashley Smith. Ashley0003@gmail.com

Farmacy Beauty: Thank you for sending that over. Let me pass this on to my team! Since it is the weekend, they might not get back to me until Monday but I'll be in touch as soon as I get an update. Please let me know if you have any questions.
Thank you!
Farmacy Beauty: You're always welcome! While waiting for my team's response, is there anything else I can help you with?
Not at this time.
Farmacy Beauty: I understand. I'll get back to you as soon as possible. Thank you for your understanding and patience!
Thank you for your help
Farmacy Beauty: You're welcome! I'll be in touch!

Farmacy Beauty: Hello, I appreciate your patience! I just heard back from my team that you can place the order with the separate full-priced items. After sending the order number we will give the price adjustment.

Please let me know if you need further assistance.
Farmacy Beauty: Thank you. I have escalated this to the team. I will let you know once I receive feedback.

I ordered a hoodie for my dog and it is way way way too small. Can I exchange it?

Comfrt: Thank you for reaching out. I'm sorry to hear that. We offer exchanges for store credit only. In order to qualify for an even exchange all items must be approved/requested within 30 days of delivery. Unfortunately, anything after the 30 day window period can not be approved. All exchanges must be in exact condition with no signs of wear and tear, stains or other signs of usage; including in the original poly bag with SKU to return in. You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://comfrt.attn.tv/aFfusl03oTVn 

You can start your return here: https://comfrt.attn.tv/aV5ngoqXMC9N/#/
I typed the order#  from the bag and it says order not found. I just got it today.  Is there a phone number? I can talk to someone person to person?
Template used: "Phone support"; last updated: 2022-09-13 01:43:15.894
Template used: "How did you get my phone number - All brands"; last updated: 2024-11-07 14:26:17.821
Template used: "Do you offer exchanges?"; last updated: 2026-02-12 19:38:17.598
Template used: "How do I start a return?"; last updated: 2024-10-10 16:30:30.595

Comfrt: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text. Seems like the order you are referring to is Order #254678253. 

We offer exchanges for store credit only. In order to qualify for an even exchange all items must be approved/requested within 30 days of delivery. All exchanges must be in exact condition with no signs of wear and tear, stains or other signs of usage; including in the original poly bag with SKU to return in. 

Please review our Refund Policy for more information on how to start the process through Loop Returns. You can start your return here: https://comfrt.attn.tv/aHvj9jwlwC4-/#/
Please note you will receive a gift card for your return, which can be used to place your new order on our website to complete the exchange. 

Hope this helps!

Baseball Lifestyle: Thank you for the screenshot, and I'm sorry for any inconvenience. I just checked, and it looks like the item you're trying to buy already has a discount applied. That's likely why the code isn't working, as our system can't stack multiple promos at checkout. Additionally, if you've signed up for text or email alerts before, our system is set up to give the same promo you previously received, so it won't work this time. I hope this helps.

No worries, our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!
